title: quercus × subintegra
intro: Quercus × subintegra, also known as the hybrid of Quercus subintegra and Quercus mongolica, is a deciduous plant species that belongs to the Fagaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Quercus × subintegra include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Quercus × subintegra can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine.
